notes: Comments open state route is now CC7.2.5 and exposes request/params diagnostics.
Post resolver tries Postgres first and store handoff/posts fallback second.
Main target: posts created on the current architecture must keep resolving after future deploys, including Post 27 after this update.
Older posts 23-26 may still fail if they were created with the pre-handoff architecture, but their debug payload is now visible through /debug/comment-open-state.
